hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$f"; (cd "$(dirname "$f")" && go vet . 2>&1 | head -20) ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*|*secret*|*Secret*|*.pem|*.key) [ "$f" = "${f%.env.example}" ] || exit 0; echo "Blocked: editing secret/.env file ($f) is not allowed. Edit .env.example instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
